# HomesProfessional.com

> South Florida real estate representation by Carlos Uzcategui — Florida Licensed Realtor® SL705771, licensed since 2001, associate of United Realty Group (3,500+ agents, 20 Florida offices). Seller and buyer representation across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties, in English and Spanish, with full Miami and South Florida REALTORS® MLS access. A separate referral-based desk connects clients buying or selling in Spain with vetted local professionals.

Key facts:
- Agent: Carlos Uzcategui, Florida Licensed Realtor® SL705771 (licensed 2001), CLHMS
- Brokerage: United Realty Group — founded 2002, 3,500+ agents, 20 Florida offices, Plantation HQ
- Markets: Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties, South Florida
- Languages: English and Spanish
- Contact: (954) 865-6622 · contact@carlosre.com · Spain line +34 646 853 078
- Spain services are referral introductions only; Carlos is licensed in Florida, not Spain

## Core pages

- [Sell in South Florida](https://homesprofessional.com/sell-south-florida): listing representation — pricing, positioning, MLS distribution, negotiation
- [Home value](https://homesprofessional.com/home-value): request a professional valuation of a South Florida property
- [Buy in South Florida](https://homesprofessional.com/buy): buyer representation with full MLS access, backed by the United Realty Group network
- [New construction](https://homesprofessional.com/new-construction): pre-construction advisory across South Florida
- [Markets](https://homesprofessional.com/markets): cities and submarkets served
- [Market data](https://homesprofessional.com/market-data): current South Florida market statistics
- [Global Desk](https://homesprofessional.com/global-desk): Spain–Florida cross-border desk and international referrals
- [Agents & referrals](https://homesprofessional.com/agents): broker-to-broker referral cooperation
- [Journal](https://homesprofessional.com/journal): market analysis and seller/buyer guides for South Florida
- [Contact](https://homesprofessional.com/contact): consultation requests

## Policies

- Equal Housing Opportunity. Information is general and not legal, tax, or financial advice.
- No guarantees of sale outcomes, prices, or timelines are made.
